title: Sigil (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sigil''' could refer to several things:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sigil]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
*'''[[Sigil system/Legends|Sigil system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] within the [[Chorlian sector/Legends|Chorlian sector]] containing the planet Sigil.
*'''[[Sigil (crystal)]]''', a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] from the Sigil system.
*'''''[[Sigil (starfighter)|Sigil]]''''', the name of a type of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|pirates]].
*'''[[Sigil (Sisterhood)]]''', a member of the [[Sisterhood of the Glorious Radiance]].
{{Disambig}}
